__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Boy with Goose,Jormungandr Scale,Plantagenet Badge,Tree of Life,Yamato Mirror,Manneken Pis
|rank=purple
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 3 Purple Relics gained, Snail ATK +40<br>Purple Relics: 60/60
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Purple Relics]]
